semantic.judge: the plan DOES declare accessibility, so this is NOT an absence finding; the declared a11y covers only colour contrast and omits what a custom div-based dropdown critically needs (keyboard operability + focus management, and a name/role/value for screen readers — it is not a native <select>); the griller surfaces exactly one ADVISORY adequacy finding at the offending declaration line (line 17), frames it as judgment for the human, and never claims a floor/absence gate or manufactures an unrelated concern.
